content:
When accessing the public page, every single user right now sees the full file directory. The title of the page is HEX, the server and system information is visible, and users can upload and download files. There's a telegram link at the bottom for HEX80.
I'm just an employee, and the office is closed today so I can't ask IT. I'm into web development, but hardly know anything about cybersecurity, so I don't really know if it's just a file setup mishap or something more malicious. I can't find much about it online. Is this a major security concern? What could have caused this?

  submitted by   /u/PrototypeChicken
[link]   [comments]
